Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Class AbstractBuiltInRuleApp

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractBuiltInRuleApp
All Implemented Interfaces:
IBuiltInRuleApp, RuleApp, EqualsModProofIrrelevancy
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractAuxiliaryContractBuiltInRuleApp, AbstractContractRuleApp, CloseAfterMergeRuleBuiltInRuleApp, DefaultBuiltInRuleApp, JmlAssertBuiltInRuleApp, LoopApplyHeadBuiltInRuleApp, LoopInvariantBuiltInRuleApp, MergeRuleBuiltInRuleApp, SetStatementBuiltInRuleApp, SMTRuleApp
public abstract class AbstractBuiltInRuleApp extends Object implements IBuiltInRuleApp

    • tryToInstantiate

      public abstract AbstractBuiltInRuleApp tryToInstantiate(Goal goal)
      Description copied from interface: IBuiltInRuleApp
      Tries to complete the rule application from the available information. Attention: Do neither add GUI code to the rules nor use this method directly Instead ask the implementation of the UserInterfaceControl to complete a built-in rule. Returns a complete app only if there is exactly one contract. If you want a complete app for combined contracts, use forceInstantiate instead. For an example implementation see e.g. UseOperationContractRule or UseDependencyContractRule.
      Specified by:
      tryToInstantiate in interface IBuiltInRuleApp

    • forceInstantiate

      public AbstractBuiltInRuleApp forceInstantiate(Goal goal)
      Specified by:
      forceInstantiate in interface IBuiltInRuleApp

      isSufficientlyComplete in interface IBuiltInRuleApp
